description: Looks up permit, exemption, and coupling-permission fields for one exact Danish registration number. Use when a user asks whether a vehicle has special permits, coupling permissions, dispensation, taxi/rental/special-use approvals, or permit dates/comments.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-vehicles-flat | WHERE plate == ?registration_number | KEEP plate, vehicle_id, brand, model, vehicle_category, usage, permit_type, permit_start_date, permit_end_date, permit_comment | LIMIT 10

registration_number.description: Exact Danish registration number, for example EN44360
